property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\Amey\anaconda3\condabin;c:\Users\Amey\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Amey\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Amey\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Intel\Shared Librariesedist\intel64\compiler;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\MinGW in;C:\Program Files\Crucial\Crucial Storage Executive;C:\Program Files (x86)\STMicroelectronics\STM32 ST-LINK Utility\ST-LINK Utility;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2024b in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;C:\Users\Amey\Downloads\apache-jmeter-5.6.3\apache-jmeter-5.6.3 in;C:\Users\Amey\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\Amey\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\Amey\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\Amey\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\MinGW in;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;C:\Users\Amey\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;;C:\intelFPGA\18.1\modelsim_ase\win32aloem;C:\Users\Amey\AppData\Roaming

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with user Amey", "DemoQA Login"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Feature file generated successfully! Feature file generated successfully!
Scenario: Login with user Amey &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/generatedLogin.feature:3&amp#27;[0m --- API CREATE USER --- Status: 201 Body: {"userID":"7348ba33-35d8-4cfc-b61d-9d175a331899","username":"Amey","books":[]} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser uses API to enter username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Amey"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Nitns$344"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.createUser(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser enters username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Amey"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Nitns$344"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.enter_credentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mclicks on login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.clicks_on_login_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlogin result should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"success"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.login_result_should_be(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m --- API DELETE USER DEBUG --- UserID to delete: 7348ba33-35d8-4cfc-b61d-9d175a331899 Fresh Token: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyTmFtZSI6IkFtZXkiLCJwYXNzd29yZCI6Ik5pdG5zJDM0NCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzI2OTM4M30.EbmLW6Sg1ntwQZR5otqzz0_NCWUy9KTnPn2plmPpi-M Delete Response Status: 204 Delete Response Body: ----------------------------- &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the user account using API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.deleteUser()&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. ERROR StatusLogger Log4j2 could not find a logging implementation. Please add log4j-core to the classpath. Using SimpleLogger to log to the console... Apr 27, 2026 11:26:03 AM org.openqa.selenium.remote.tracing.opentelemetry.OpenTelemetryTracer createTracer INFO: Using OpenTelemetry for tracing

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with user Arjun", "DemoQA Login"](2)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with user Arjun &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/generatedLogin.feature:11&amp#27;[0m --- API CREATE USER --- Status: 201 Body: {"userID":"7e36c16e-f19d-447b-96e8-1ce586fb3a61","username":"Arjun","books":[]} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser uses API to enter username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Arjun"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Korde#123"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.createUser(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser enters username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Arjun"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Korde#123"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.enter_credentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mclicks on login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.clicks_on_login_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlogin result should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"success"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.login_result_should_be(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m --- API DELETE USER DEBUG --- UserID to delete: 7e36c16e-f19d-447b-96e8-1ce586fb3a61 Fresh Token: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyTmFtZSI6IkFyanVuIiwicGFzc3dvcmQiOiJLb3JkZSMxMjMiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcyNjkzOTR9.bMvG95H1jAGyZs-K-KHrvKovrO81e5QUBtlF5ynSXbk Delete Response Status: 204 Delete Response Body: ----------------------------- &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the user account using API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.deleteUser()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with user Narendra &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/generatedLogin.feature:19&amp#27;[0m --- API CREATE USER --- Status: 201 Body: {"userID":"ceb8b627-3663-4c82-ac0e-e674f88c4fe9","username":"Narendra","books":[]} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser uses API to enter username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Narendra"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Modi&234"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.createUser(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser enters username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Narendra"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Modi&234"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.enter_credentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mclicks on login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.clicks_on_login_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlogin result should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"success"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.login_result_should_be(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m --- API DELETE USER DEBUG --- UserID to delete: ceb8b627-3663-4c82-ac0e-e674f88c4fe9 Fresh Token: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyTmFtZSI6Ik5hcmVuZHJhIiwicGFzc3dvcmQiOiJNb2RpJjIzNCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzI2OTQwNn0.dww8VWi0ES9oPRkG1Puf3_yXc17JOLVc-zzghkxh2eU Delete Response Status: 204 Delete Response Body: ----------------------------- &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the user account using API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.deleteUser()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with user Rahul &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/generatedLogin.feature:27&amp#27;[0m --- API CREATE USER --- Status: 201 Body: {"userID":"aeace01d-e3b6-4a60-8d82-8700ba0c0995","username":"Rahul","books":[]} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser uses API to enter username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Rahul"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Gandhi#123"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.createUser(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser enters username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Rahul"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Gandhi#123"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.enter_credentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mclicks on login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.clicks_on_login_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlogin result should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"success"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.login_result_should_be(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m --- API DELETE USER DEBUG --- UserID to delete: aeace01d-e3b6-4a60-8d82-8700ba0c0995 Fresh Token: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyTmFtZSI6IlJhaHVsIiwicGFzc3dvcmQiOiJHYW5kaGkjMTIzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzc3MjY5NDE4fQ.cuIeQ3KO2pwQnrLcbD96KNwFz9mmQghKFJvnNC48Dys Delete Response Status: 204 Delete Response Body: ----------------------------- &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the user account using API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.deleteUser()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with user DattuBhau &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/generatedLogin.feature:35&amp#27;[0m --- API CREATE USER --- Status: 201 Body: {"userID":"8e9effbd-a096-449d-adb7-d1cd490d594d","username":"DattuBhau","books":[]} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser uses API to enter username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"DattuBhau"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"YcceC#123"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.createUser(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser enters username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"DattuBhau"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"YcceC#123"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.enter_credentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mclicks on login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.clicks_on_login_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlogin result should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"success"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.login_result_should_be(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m --- API DELETE USER DEBUG --- UserID to delete: 8e9effbd-a096-449d-adb7-d1cd490d594d Fresh Token: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyTmFtZSI6IkRhdHR1QmhhdSIsInBhc3N3b3JkIjoiWWNjZUMjMTIzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzc3MjY5NDI5fQ.YNIovo5WuIuK2Yk6Z1RCoL80cfLZrSv1CF_NuBfO6pg Delete Response Status: 204 Delete Response Body: ----------------------------- &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the user account using API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.deleteUser()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with user Pepa", "DemoQA Login"](6)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with user Pepa &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/generatedLogin.feature:43&amp#27;[0m --- API CREATE USER --- Status: 201 Body: {"userID":"005d480e-1c6b-411b-bd40-f8e99944e11c","username":"Pepa","books":[]} &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser uses API to enter username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Pepa"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Piggy%345"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.createUser(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser enters username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Pepa"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Piggy%345"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.enter_credentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mclicks on login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.clicks_on_login_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlogin result should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"success"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ExcelWithAllTestCases.login_result_should_be(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m --- API DELETE USER DEBUG --- UserID to delete: 005d480e-1c6b-411b-bd40-f8e99944e11c Fresh Token: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyTmFtZSI6IlBlcGEiLCJwYXNzd29yZCI6IlBpZ2d5JTM0NSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzI2OTQ0MH0.53kptUSLhZ7OQw61A30h3GzBnpqQnVHBwgAMO191Cxw Delete Response Status: 204 Delete Response Body: ----------------------------- &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the user account using API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.ApiSteps.deleteUser()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Run JMeter performance test", "Performance Testing"](7)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Run JMeter performance test &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/performance.feature:3&amp#27;[0m WARN StatusConsoleListener The use of package scanning to locate plugins is deprecated and will be removed in a future release WARN StatusConsoleListener The use of package scanning to locate plugins is deprecated and will be removed in a future release WARN StatusConsoleListener The use of package scanning to locate plugins is deprecated and will be removed in a future release WARN StatusConsoleListener The use of package scanning to locate plugins is deprecated and will be removed in a future release Creating summariser <summary> Created the tree successfully using src/test/resources/jmeter/testplan.jmx Starting standalone test @ 2026 Apr 27 11:27:24 IST (1777269444867) Waiting for possible Shutdown/StopTestNow/HeapDump/ThreadDump message on port 4445 summary = 10 in 00:00:02 = 6.1/s Avg: 1089 Min: 684 Max: 1343 Err: 0 (0.00%) Tidying up ... @ 2026 Apr 27 11:27:26 IST (1777269446721) ... end of run &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI execute JMeter test&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.JMeterSteps.runTest()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mresponse time should be below &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m2000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m ms&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.JMeterSteps.validatePerformance(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Text data with fullName Amey Kamde", "Text Box Verification"](8)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Text data with fullName Amey Kamde &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/textBoxFeatureFile.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on text box page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TextBoxSteps.userIsOnTextBoxPage()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser enters fullname &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Amey Kamde"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and email &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ameykamde@gmail.com"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TextBoxSteps.fillUserNameAndEmail(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser also enters current Address &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Ycce"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and permanent address &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"YCCE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TextBoxSteps.fillAddresses(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser clicks on submit button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TextBoxSteps.clickOnSubmitBtn()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mtext data result should be verified&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.TextBoxSteps.textDataShouldAppear()&amp#27;[0m
